name: Tide of Fear
description:
Day 27. Thalassophobia

Goretober Day 27

⚠️Dead Dove Warning

⚠️ Dead Dove: Do Not Eat — This story contains psychological and physical horror with thalassophobia (fear of deep water). Reader discretion is advised.

The story depicts drowning, crushing pressure, and disorientation in dark, open water. Storms, isolation, and the unknown amplify fear and helplessness.

It explores panic, loss of control, and the breakdown of the mind under extreme stress. The ocean acts as a predatory, almost sentient force, with unseen entities and strange, threatening movements below.

The tone is tense and suffocating, focused on dread, insignificance, and fear of the deep.

I have been using my own Goretober list! I have combined it with my Kinktober list but will be posting separately for each! I will post twice daily, one for Goretober and one for Kinktober. Here is the link to the list!

You can be anything you want; human, demi-human, etc....

Picture is not mine but I would love to give credit to the original artist!

♡Requests are welcomed! Message me on discord at officialm1lf or leave a review for a request!
creator: OfficialM1lf
